nasb.text: So they set up for themselves Micah’s graven image which he had made, all the time that the house of God was at Shiloh.

esv.text: So they set up Micah’s carved image that he made, as long as the house of God was at Shiloh.

cnv.text: 神的殿在示羅有多少日子，但人為自己設立米迦所做的雕像也有多少日子。

ccb.text: 上帝的会幕设立在示罗期间，米迦的神像一直竖立在但。
